title: Regional Gift Cards
description: I want a gift card that can be used to purchase products from the English Channel region.
narrative: The user is looking for gift vouchers that can be redeemed at local retailers or online portals that sell locally produced items emblematic of the French English Channel area—such as oysters, cider, traditional crafts, and regional gift boxes. Relevance criteria: the card must be explicitly linked to regional businesses (e.g., AttitudeManche, Spirit of Cadeau), support purchase of locally sourced products, and provide a clear mechanism for redemption. Items that are generic national or international gift cards, or that do not mention a connection to the English Channel or its local know‑how, are considered non‑relevant.

title: Lamb Tajine Recipe
description: How can I cook lamb tajine with vegetables, including ingredient amounts, cooking steps, and optional spice adjustments?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed recipe for lamb tajine with vegetables that provides explicit ingredient quantities, step‑by‑step preparation instructions, total cooking time, and practical tips on adjusting spice levels or portion sizes. Relevant content should include complete recipe tables, cooking method details, ingredient lists, and user comments that discuss variations such as reducing spices or halving vegetables. Non‑recipe or unrelated information should be excluded.

title: Evora GT410 Performance & Customization
description: Comparing the Lotus Evora GT410 and GT410 Sport: what are the key performance differences, price variations, and standard feature sets, and what customization options are available including special editions and the Norton & Sons collaboration?
narrative: The user is researching the Lotus Evora GT410 line and needs a comprehensive overview that covers the performance specifications (horsepower, weight, acceleration times), the cost difference between the base GT410 and the GT410 Sport, and which features have moved from options to standard on the GT410. They also want details on the special limited‑edition versions, such as the custom color schemes derived from the Lotus Esprit S1 and the special edition carbon (Light‑is‑Right) pack, as well as the collaboration specifics with the Savile Row outfitter Norton & Sons. Relevance will be judged by documents that mention any of these topics, provide exact numbers or price points, and discuss customization or collaboration details.

title: Private Chef Booking
description: I want to find whether I can book a chef for a personalized dinner using local seasonal ingredients and free‑range poultry, taking into account menu options, pricing, dietary restrictions, availability, and cancellation rules.
narrative: The user wants to arrange a private meal prepared by a chef who uses local seasonal products, including free‑range poultry from the JC Farm. They seek information on available menus, price per person, optional supplements, dietary‑restriction handling, reservation dates and times, and the applicable cancellation policy.

title: Eco‑friendly Car Seat Mat
description: Which anti‑skid car seat protection products are safe for the environment and protect leather or fabric seats?
narrative: The user wants a seat mat that prevents scratching and slipping while avoiding the use of chemicals that could become micropollutants in water systems. Relevance criteria include ISOFIX compatibility, non‑slip performance, washable construction, and materials identified as low‑VOC or with eco‑certifications. Positive user reviews confirming protection of seat finishes and no adverse environmental impact are also required.

title: Maritime Workboat Types
description: What are the various types of maritime workboats and service vessels, and what functions do they perform?
narrative: The user is compiling a research report on maritime service vessels for a university project. They require a clear taxonomy of workboats—including dredges, tugs, pilot boats, cable‑laying vessels, fireboats, icebreakers, and other specialized vessels—and a description of each type’s primary function, typical operational context, and key distinguishing attributes. Documents that list vessel names without functional detail or provide only generic overviews should be considered irrelevant.

title: Used SsangYong car search
description: Where can I find a reliable, cost‑effective used SsangYong vehicle with good mileage and low CO₂ emissions?
narrative: The user is looking for listings of used SsangYong cars, primarily from individual sellers on La Tribune Auto, and wants to evaluate them based on price, mileage, fuel consumption, CO₂ emissions, and vehicle performance. Relevance requires documents that provide up‑to‑date advertisements, detailed feature information, and potential financing or credit options.

title: Brittany Family Beach Campsite
description: Which family‑friendly campsites in Brittany near the sea offer accommodations, swimming pools, pet‑friendly policies, Wi‑Fi, and price comparisons?
narrative: The user wants to compare holiday rentals at beach‑side campsites in Brittany, focusing on family suitability. Relevant criteria include proximity to the sea (<500 m), availability of indoor/outdoor pools, pet‑friendly or animal‑accepted policy, Wi‑Fi connectivity, accessibility features, and weekly cost. The goal is to identify campsites that meet all these needs and provide reliable booking information.

title: CPF Funding Blueprint
description: Can I use my Personal Training Account (CPF) to finance a specific course, and how should I proceed if my credits are insufficient?
narrative: The user plans to enroll in a specific training program and wants to verify whether their accumulated CPF rights cover the training cost. If not, they seek guidance on mobilising partial CPF rights, applying for additional funding through Pôle emploi, and understanding potential remuneration or benefits during the course.

title: Client Space Creation
description: How can I create and access my online client space for AXA Bank or Veolia Water?
narrative: I need specific, step‑by‑step instructions for setting up and logging into the online customer portal of AXA Bank (www.axabanque.fr) or Veolia Water (service‑client.veoliaeau.fr). Relevant documents should cover account creation, required personal data, password and confidential code recovery, activation steps, and official contact numbers for troubleshooting. Non‑relevant material such as general company profiles, unrelated banking services, or policy documents should be excluded.

title: Plug‑in Hybrid Selection
description: Which plug‑in hybrid car offers the best balance of electric range, cost, and charging convenience for a daily commuter?
narrative: The user intends to buy a plug‑in hybrid vehicle that maximises electric‑only travel for short urban trips while still having sufficient thermal engine range for longer journeys. Relevance is confined to documents detailing battery capacity, on‑road electric range (particularly in city cycles), charging times (wallbox vs. home outlet), fuel consumption, CO₂ emissions, and price. The user also values information on tax incentives, battery warranty, and vehicle performance (acceleration, top speed) for normal driving conditions. Any answer that lacks these criteria or focuses merely on hybrid categories without comparative specifications is considered irrelevant.

title: Early‑season Potatoes
description: Find detailed guidance on selecting, storing, and cooking small potatoes (shot/pomegranate) for Swedish‑style preparations, with attention to nutrition.
narrative: The user wants to prepare Swedish‑style potatoes using early or pomegranate potatoes. Relevance is judged by documents that provide practical advice on choosing the right variety, preservation techniques, step‑by‑step cooking methods (oven, pan, sauté etc.) suited to a Swedish‑style dish, and nutritional facts (low carbohydrate, high protein, fiber, vitamins B and C) that align with a healthy, low‑calorie meal plan. The answer should mention storage conditions (paper/cloth bag, not plastic), optimal cooking times, and how to pair the potatoes with typical Swedish accompaniments such as butter‑garlic, Parmesan, and breadcrumbs, while noting any nuances about size consistency and cooking temperature guidelines.

title: Ego Dissolution
description: What practices does Eckhart Tolle recommend for transcending the egoic mind and achieving cosmic consciousness?
narrative: The user seeks actionable techniques from Tolle’s teachings that facilitate ego dissolution and deeper awareness. Relevant documents should detail specific steps such as non-reaction, noticing the inner voice, and identifying the ego, and should reference Tolle’s works (e.g., *The Power of Now*, *A New Earth*). Content that merely mentions spiritual ideals without concrete Tolle‑based methods is considered irrelevant.

title: Kerbal Space Program Families
description: Where can families find a Kerbal Space Program workshop in Vitry‑sur‑Seine, and what are the dates, cost, and content details?
narrative: The user is a parent looking to attend a hands‑on space‑flight simulator workshop with their children in Vitry‑sur‑Seine. Relevance requires documents that list the workshop dates, location, price range, and family‑friendly activities offered.

title: Bike Park Suppliers
description: Identify companies that can supply timber and building materials for the construction and maintenance of a bike park in the French Alps.
narrative: The user is planning the development of a new bike park at Serre Chevalier and requires a list of suitable suppliers for timber and other building materials. Relevant documents must contain a company name, SIREN number, physical address, and an economic activity code that indicates wholesale (business‑to‑business) trade in timber and building materials (e.g., 4673A). Preference is given to companies located in or near the Savoie region or other Alpine provinces, but any such company could be considered if it demonstrates experience or specialization in outdoor infrastructure. Non‑relevant documents are those that mention only unrelated industries or lack the required identifiers.

title: Scriptural Advantage
description: Which biblical passages discuss the idea of taking advantage, and what theological interpretations are offered?
narrative: The user seeks verses, commentaries, or sermons that explicitly mention the phrase “take advantage” or describe situations where individuals take advantage of God’s gifts, circumstances, or others. Relevance is defined by passages that illustrate the concept of advantage in a biblical context—whether positive (benefiting from blessings) or negative (exploiting others)—and the associated moral or theological insights suggested by scripture or scholarly interpretation.

title: Historical Media Portrayals
description: How have French media outlets depicted both historical figures like Jean Moulin and contemporary travel programs such as Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed discussions and analyses of French media coverage that link the portrayal of the resistance hero Jean Moulin—especially around his Pantheon ceremony—to the depiction of remote indigenous communities in the travel series Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu. Relevance criteria include: references to editorial commentary, cultural or political framing, audience reception, and evidence of thematic continuity between historical commemoration and contemporary documentary storytelling. Non‑relevant entries are those that focus purely on unrelated financial, technical, or unrelated cultural content without connecting the two media representations.

title: Potato European History
description: When and how did the potato become cultivated and socially accepted in Europe, and what key figures and events drove its spread?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive historical narrative on the potato’s introduction to Europe. Relevance criteria include detailed timelines of discovery and adoption, descriptions of transport routes from the New World, roles of influential individuals (e.g., Parmentier, Pizarro, Francis Drake), agricultural and economic impacts, references to famines (e.g., Great Famine), and cultural integration. Documents should provide primary or well‑researched secondary sources covering these aspects without unrelated recipe or unrelated current news content.

title: Family Spa Day
description: What are the requirements and options for booking a private spa session at the leisure centre in Pessac for a family, considering current Covid‑19 safety measures?
narrative: The user wants to understand how to reserve a private space (sauna, steam room, spa) for a family group at Eaux Paradis in Pessac. They need details about the maximum number of persons allowed, mask and sanitisation rules, whether a sanitary pass is required, available thematic rooms suitable for a family size of up to 12, opening hours, and the contact procedure for reservation, in order to plan a compliant and enjoyable spa experience.

title: Switching Suppliers
description: Should I switch from EDF to a cheaper energy provider in AZERAT while I have a Linky meter and what factors should I weigh?
narrative: The user is newly relocated to AZERAT and wants to compare EDF with alternative suppliers such as Ohm Energy. They need information on tariffs, especially for Linky‑meter‑only offers, estimated savings, termination fees, meter‑commission charges, and practical steps for switching. The relevance criteria include up‑to‑date contract details, consumer experiences, and the impact of consumption patterns (e.g., second‑home usage or off‑peak usage).

title: Kia 2021 Promotions
description: What were the promotional offers and pricing details for Kia vehicles in August 2021?
narrative: The user wants a concise summary of Kia’s August 2021 promotional campaign, including specific discount amounts, models covered, and any price or financing terms that were advertised during that month. Relevant documents must contain August‑specific promotion data, model names, deal conditions, and pricing figures to satisfy this information need.

title: Gaulish Women Resistance
description: What evidence exists of Celtic women’s participation in resistance against Julius Caesar, and how did their roles influence post‑conquest Gaulian society?
narrative: The user seeks documents that provide concrete or scholarly evidence of women’s active combat, leadership, and council participation during the Gallic Wars, including primary Roman accounts, Celtic oral histories, archaeological findings, and modern historical analyses. Relevance is judged by the presence of verifiable sources or well‑researched arguments that discuss female martial roles, political influence, and their impact on Gaul’s social structure after Caesar’s conquest. Non‑historical fiction, purely mythic or unsubstantiated claims are to be excluded.

title: Lisbon Car Rental Options
description: Which car rental options in Lisbon suit a budget-conscious traveler needing flexible pick‑up times and detailed cancellation policies?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive comparison of Lisbon car‑rental providers, considering price, pick‑up/drop‑off locations (especially airports), vehicle categories, driver age limits, insurance coverage, discount codes, and COVID‑related booking changes. Relevant results should provide up‑to‑date comparator pages, explicit pricing tables, policy details, and practical booking tips for Lisbon.

title: Luxury Car vs Van
description: How do luxury car rentals in Nantes compare to van rentals at Pula Airport in terms of cost, capacity, and event suitability?
narrative: The user intends to book a vehicle for two different scenarios: a luxurious car for special occasions in Nantes (weddings, birthdays, photo shoots) and a van for transporting a large group or cargo in Pula. They need up‑to‑date pricing details, rental duration options, vehicle types, and any special features (e.g., one‑way fees, age restrictions, insurance requirements). Relevance is judged by the presence of pricing, capacity, location coverage, event‑specific benefits, and any conditional offers mentioned in the source documents.

title: Edible Safety of Blight-Infected Produce
description: Is it safe to eat tomatoes or potatoes that show symptoms of downy mildew/late blight, and can they be used for canning or seed saving?
narrative: The user is a home gardener or small-scale farmer looking for evidence-based guidance on handling produce that has visible symptoms of downy mildew (Phytophthora infestans) or late blight. They want to know whether eating infected fruit poses any health risk, whether damaged parts can be removed safely, if such produce can be canned without compromising food safety or pH balance, and whether seeds from infected tubers or tomato plants can be salvaged for future planting. Relevant documents should discuss scientific studies, expert opinions (e.g., from plant pathology professors), USDA or FDA guidelines, and practical advice on trimming, storage, and seed preservation. Content unrelated to the safety of eating or processing infected produce—such as general gardening how‑to, unrelated plant diseases, or historical accounts of the 1845 potato crisis—should be considered irrelevant unless it directly informs the user’s specific safety questions.

title: Beaujolaise Oil Origins
description: What are the historical origins and geographic sources of Beaujolaise oil, and how has it evolved into a culinary product?
narrative: The user wants to understand the background of Beaujolaise oil, specifically its roots in the Burgundy region (particularly Beaune), its development from local viticulture and spice blends, and what makes it distinct among regional oils. Relevant documents should mention Beaune’s wine heritage, the establishment of Beaujolaise Oilworks, and any historical references linking the oil to local production or tradition.

title: Low‑heel Waterproof Ankle Boots
description: Where can I find women's low‑heel ankle boots that are waterproof, suitable for winter, and made from eco‑friendly leather?
narrative: The user seeks a pair of women’s ankle boots that combine a modest low heel (1–3 cm) with full water‑resistance and winter‑appropriate warmth (fur lining, rubber sole). She also values sustainability, preferring footwear containing at least 50 % eco‑responsible leather and clear environmental certifications. Relevant information includes brand reputation, price comparisons, real‑world reviews, and explicit waterproofing claims, as well as sizing details for EU to US conversions.

title: Renault ESPACE Engine Reprogramming
description: How does reprogramming the 2.0 DCI engine improve power and safety for a 2002 Renault ESPACE?
narrative: User seeks detailed technical and safety outcomes of engine reprogramming, including potential power gains, risk mitigation, cost, and warranty considerations for a 2002 Renault ESPACE 2.0 DCI 130CH.

title: Cagliari Car Rental Deals
description: What are the best car rental options in Cagliari that offer low price, free cancellation, and unlimited mileage?
narrative: The user wants to rent a car in Cagliari for a short or medium term stay, prioritizing affordability, flexibility through free cancellation, and the convenience of unlimited mileage so they can explore the island without extra costs. Relevant documents are those that provide specific price points, list which agencies offer these features, give locations (airport vs. city centre), and include booking tips for high-season periods.

title: Unlimited Electric Car Rental
description: Which private car rental in Paris provides unlimited mileage, electric models, free airport delivery, and all-included insurance?
narrative: The user is looking to rent an electric vehicle from a private owner near Paris. They want no deposit, unlimited kilometers, delivery directly to an airport, and full all‑risk insurance included. The user wants to understand which owners meet these criteria and assess the reliability and cost structure of such rentals.

title: Heathrow Transfer Options
description: How do I compare prices, vehicle types, and service details for private transfers from Carmarthen to London Heathrow?
narrative: The user intends to travel from Carmarthen to Heathrow and needs to evaluate different transfer options. They want to compare economy versus business or luxury class costs, assess the available fleet (Mercedes E, S, Viano, minivan, bus), and understand service features such as meet‑and‑greet, hourly rental, and pricing structures. Relevance criteria: documents that provide pricing tables, vehicle specifications, and comprehensive service descriptions for transfers between Carmarthen and Heathrow.

title: Affordable Car Insurance
description: How can I find the cheapest car insurance in France while ensuring adequate coverage?
narrative: The user is seeking information on low‑cost car insurance options in France, including comparisons of quotes, discount opportunities, coverage and deductible choices, and the impact of factors such as driving record, parking location, and optional warranties. Relevant documents should provide up‑to‑date comparative rankings, tips for reducing premiums, explanations of coverage gaps, and guidance on evaluating the real value of different policies.

title: Mariah Carey Ireland Tour
description: What are the dates, venues, and ticket details for Mariah Carey's upcoming concerts in Ireland?
narrative: The user wants to plan or investigate attending Mariah Carey's performances in Ireland. They require accurate dates, venue locations (e.g., 3Arena in Dublin), and ticket sale information, as well as any related logistical details such as opening acts, admission times, and travel considerations.

title: Indre COVID Update
description: Provide current COVID‑19 statistics for Indre‑et‑Loire and the general practitioners responsible for patient care in the department.
narrative: The user wants up‑to‑date, detailed COVID‑19 data (positive cases, hospitalisations, deaths, cured figures, time‑series charts) specifically for the Indre‑et‑Loire region, as well as the contact information (names, addresses) of local general practitioners who are actively treating patients. Relevance is determined by documents that contain quantitative health statistics for the region and a directory of GP practitioners within that same department. Documents that do not include region‑specific data, or that refer to other diseases or regions, are considered irrelevant.

title: Helvar Energy Savings
description: I want to know the measurable energy savings achieved by Helvar's LED lighting solutions in large office buildings.
narrative: The user seeks case study evidence of energy reductions from Helvar installations, specifically documents that report before-and-after energy usage, percentage savings, or cost benefits directly attributed to their lighting control systems.

title: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: What ergonomic office chairs are available under $200 with adjustable armrests and lumbar support?
narrative: The user seeks office chairs suitable for long working hours, prioritizing adjustability, lumbar support, armrests, and affordable price; relevant documents should include chair specifications, price, and features that meet these criteria.

title: Photo Pendant Selection
description: How can I choose the right photo pendant necklace that balances material, chain style, photo slot size and price for a thoughtful gift?
narrative: The user is looking for guidance on selecting a photo pendant necklace. They want to compare options based on the type of metal (silver, gold 750/925, rose‑gold), chain construction (mesh, gourmet, forçat, torsade), the dimensions of the photo cup or pencil (2–3 cm), and overall cost. Relevance will be judged by documents that describe these attributes, mention price ranges, chain lengths, and options for customizing the photo. The answer should help the user navigate the specific criteria that determine the quality and suitability of a pendant for personal or gift use.

title: Egg‑free Vegetarian Quiche
description: I need a quiche lorraine recipe that does not use eggs and is vegetarian.
narrative: The user is allergic to eggs and wants a vegetarian take on quiche lorraine, so relevant documents should describe a custard substitute, avoid lardons or any pork, and use plant‑based cheese or alternatives while maintaining the classic flavor profile.

title: Baby Hazel Care
description: What are the essential activities and considerations for caring for the baby character in interactive simulation games?
narrative: The user is looking for information on how to assist the baby figure named Hazel in various online simulation games, specifically regarding daily routines such as feeding, bathing, dressing, medical treatment for injuries or illnesses, and engaging in play activities. Relevant points include the timing and method of each care activity, the required tools or items to gather, and how to handle situations like fractured bones, stomach problems, or routine bedtime routines. Documents that discuss Baby Hazel’s hand fracture, stomach care, bedtime, and other care-related games are directly relevant. Content unrelated to caring or routine activity guidance for the character is irrelevant.

title: Sustainable Mobility Package
description: What are the legal limits, implementation challenges, and employee benefits of France’s Sustainable Mobility Package introduced by the LOM Act?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive analysis of the Sustainable Mobility Package for a corporate HR or procurement professional, focusing on (1) the maximum annual reimbursement cap (€500 or €600 combined with transport tickets), (2) eligibility and regulatory constraints for employers, (3) logistical issues such as uneven availability of soft mobility modes across regions, and (4) impact on employee well‑being and recruitment. Relevant documents must discuss these policy details, practical implementation hurdles, and the package’s influence on commuting patterns and health considerations.

title: SFR Nevers Outage
description: Is SFR currently experiencing service outages in Nevers, and what details are available?
narrative: The user is looking for an up‑to‑date, detailed picture of SFR service disruptions in Nevers, Burgundy‑Franche‑Comté. They want to know which services (internet, phone, TV, Wi‑Fi, etc.) are affected, the geographic extent (postal codes, neighborhoods), the time frame of the outage, reported causes, and any official or user‑reported resolution status. Documents that provide recent user‑generated reports, official SFR outage dashboards, local news releases, or social media exchanges that include explicit outage information for Nevers will be considered relevant. Documents that only describe general SFR services, unrelated SFR entertainment content, or older historical incidents not tied to the current outage episode will be deemed irrelevant.

title: Oil Lamp Safety
description: What are the best safety practices for operating an oil lamp?
narrative: The user wants detailed, practical guidance on how to use an oil lamp safely at home or in a domestic setting. Relevance criteria include documents that provide step‑by‑step safety precautions, such as not leaving the lamp unattended, choosing the correct type of oil (e.g., refined white petroleum), proper wick preparation and placement, guidelines to prevent overfilling and direct flame contact with the oil, and secure storage away from children and animals. Content that merely discusses historical use, manufacturer details, or unrelated product listings without concrete safety instructions is considered irrelevant.

title: Portugal to Spain budget
description: What are the cheapest flight and car rental options for traveling from Porto to Faro and then to Vic, Spain?
narrative: The user is planning a budget‑conscious trip that starts with a flight from Porto (OPO) to Faro (FAO) in Portugal, followed by a segment to Vic in Spain. They want the lowest available airfare on chosen dates—preferably a direct flight—and the most affordable car‑rental deals in Vic, including price, fuel policy and insurance details. Relevance should be judged by documents that provide up‑to‑date pricing, airline and car‑rental comparatives, and booking guidance to satisfy the user’s cost constraints.

title: Potato-Apple Fusion
description: I want recipes that combine potatoes and apples in one dish.
narrative: The user seeks culinary ideas that incorporate both potatoes and apples together, preferably in a single cooking method, with straightforward preparation and minimal additional ingredients, suitable for a quick dinner. Relevant documents should describe how to combine the two produce and provide clear instructions, ingredient lists, and cooking techniques that highlight the integration of both foods.

title: One‑Month Return Bonus
description: Can a new employee on a CDI with a DDA claim the return‑to‑work bonus after only one month of work, and what exact conditions apply?
narrative: A user who has just found a CDI after a period of unemployment (holding a DDA and having previously been on RSA/RMI) is seeking to determine whether the French return‑to‑work bonus is still payable after one month of employment. They need details on the legal basis, the required documentation, the role of CAF or Pôle Emploi, any time‑threshold requirements, and whether past receipt of social benefits (RSA/RMI) affects eligibility. The relevance criteria include documents that discuss the bonus’s current status (whether it is still paid since the transition to the RSA in 2009), eligibility by contract type (CDI versus CDD or A) and duration of employment, mandatory identity documents for claimants, and procedural steps for claiming the €1,000‑range payment. The user’s intent is to understand both the current applicability of the bonus and the procedural compliance needed to receive it.
